title: The Dwarven Forge
description: A mod adding weapons, armors and a new runes system, all around a new whole race, the dwarves!
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/nf0CuFQ.png) ### **__Dependencies__** **__Features__** * Added a new race villager-like, they live in cities underground across all the world! They are protected by dwarven warriors, you can convert any unemployed dwarf or low level dwarf by right clicking with an axe * A new runes system; runes can be added to armor to give little attributes to the player, like extra armor, speed or health, they are obtained trading with the dwarves * Added a new set of armor and tools, the Dwarven metal ingot is obtained trading with dwarves or killing guards (You monster.) And that's it, yeah, it is a small mod, lol
